Rose of Red Lake
Rose of Red Lake, by viscardiac ©
Allegiance House Crane
Race First Men
Culture Reach
Father Garth Greenhand
Books
  • The World of Ice & Fire (mentioned)
  • The Rise of the Dragon (mentioned)

Rose of Red Lake is a legendary daughter of Garth Greenhand and ancestor of House Crane of Red Lake.

History[ ]

According to legend, Rose could transform into a crane at will. Some say this ability manifests in women of House Crane from time to time.[1]
